title: New ClawHub skill: gif-search - Search and download GIFs from the Tenor API. Supports search
content:
Search and download GIFs from the Tenor API. Supports search, trending, and random GIF lookup with customizable limits.

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: clawhub.ai/skills/skills/gif-search

Part of the Hermes autonomous product stack (31 agent-native tools, all CI-tested).
Sponsor if useful: GitHub Sponsors / Buy Me a Coffee.
